$schema_note: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the Facebook & Instagram Ad Generator (Skill 48) pipeline. Mirrors the Movie Producer VIDEO-PIPELINE-MANIFEST.json enforcement spine. NOT a file-for-file copy: the driver (48-facebook-ad-generator/scripts/ad_director.py) gates on an explicit per-phase depends_on map (S2/S3/S4 run in parallel after PICK-10; S5 after S4; S6 after S2,S3; S7 after S5,S6), NOT Skill 47's straight 'every lower-order phase' rule. Build-time lockstep (ad_sync_check.py) validates ad_director.py + ad_build_check.py + the MASTER-AD-QC-AUTOFAIL-RULESET.md Section-5 table + the paid-advertisement role-library + the fb-ad-craft SOP set against THIS file, in BOTH directions, and exits 4 on drift. Before dispatching phase N the driver requires EVERY phase in N.depends_on to carry an attestation in working/checkpoints/ad_process_manifest.json AND its produces_artifact on disk, else HARD ABORT (AF-FBAD-DEP-SKIPPED, exit 2). The two human gates PICK-10 and PUBLISH are NON-SKIPPABLE: no owner-authorized skip and no --adhoc relaxation can bypass them. SOP-LOCKED: any added/changed SOP, role, or gate MUST update this manifest (+bump manifest_version), add an enforcing py_symbol in ad_director.py / ad_build_check.py, add the AF code to the MASTER ruleset Section-5 table, and add a negative test in test_ad_preflight.py. ad_sync_check.py exits 4 if any of those is skipped.

deliverables_required.label: completed intake brief / job manifest
deliverables_required.note: >256 bytes; produced at S0-INTAKE. Carries job_id (the run-id / receipt-number), show name, audience profile reference, money ceiling, estimated cost, requestor.

deliverables_required.label: run-id no-double-charge ledger
deliverables_required.note: >64 bytes; produced at S0-INTAKE. Carries run_id (== job_id), spent_usd running tally, and an events[] log so a retry skips paid work and never charges twice.

deliverables_required.label: Kie image generation receipt (10 real task-ids, 1500x1500, gpt-image-* model)
deliverables_required.note: >256 bytes; produced at S5-IMAGE-GEN. Carries one entry per image with a real kie_task_id, width/height 1500, and a gpt-image-* model id.

deliverables_required.label: PLAI-ready handoff package
deliverables_required.note: >256 bytes; produced at S7-DELIVER. Hosted image links + copy variants + 3-tier targeting table with every required PLAI builder field.

phases.name: Intake — Read the two inputs, open the campaign, set the receipt-number + money ceiling

preflight.label: job-manifest.json (brief_complete:true — job_id, show_name, audience_profile_ref, money_ceiling_usd, estimated_cost_usd, owner all present)

additional_preflights.label: money estimate <= ceiling BEFORE any spend (AF-FBAD-COST-CEILING)
run-id ledger present + namespaced by job_id with an events[] log (AF-FBAD-RECEIPT-NAMESPACE)

phases.name: Overlays — Write the ~70 baked-in overlay lines (Brendan Kane + Phil Jones + Shelle Rose Charvet)

additional_preflights.label: every overlay line is OVERLAY_WORD_MIN..OVERLAY_WORD_MAX words (AF-FBAD-OVERLAY-WORDCOUNT)
the fixed locked top line is present (AF-FBAD-OVERLAY-TOPLINE)
copy is on-mission: feature the guest/show, never 'sell a product' (AF-FBAD-ON-MISSION)
the client's exact audience wording is preserved verbatim (AF-FBAD-AUDIENCE-WORDING)

phases.name: Pick-10 — FIRST human pause: owner replies PICK: n,n,... and the ten are saved

preflight.label: selection is exactly SELECTION_COUNT_LOCKED (default 10) distinct picks (AF-FBAD-SELECTION-COUNT)

additional_preflights.label: every pick is a real in-range index of the overlays (a true subset) (AF-FBAD-SELECTION-SUBSET)

phases.name: Primary text — Write the 10 ad bodies (Robert Bly + Joanna Wiebe + Donald Miller + Alex Hormozi)

preflight.label: every body opens with a hook <= BODY_HOOK_MAX_CHARS (default 125) chars (AF-FBAD-BODY-HOOK)

additional_preflights.label: every body carries exactly BODY_CTA_COUNT (default 3) calls-to-action (AF-FBAD-BODY-CTA)
every body's emoji count is within BODY_EMOJI_MIN..BODY_EMOJI_MAX (AF-FBAD-BODY-EMOJI)
Gate A (The Words) independent QC scorecard >= 8.5, no category < 7 (AF-FBAD-COPY-QC)

phases.name: Headlines — Write the 10 headlines in only the locked shapes (Robert Bly + Brendan Kane)

preflight.label: every headline conforms to one of HEADLINE_SHAPES_LOCKED (AF-FBAD-HEADLINE-SHAPE)

phases.name: Image prompts — Write the 10 image-instruction prompts (AI Image Generator Specialist + Design Intelligence Unit)

additional_preflights.label: every prompt follows the fixed PROMPT_BUILD_ORDER sections in order (AF-FBAD-PROMPT-ORDER)
the brand style-block + the exact baked-in words are spelled out per prompt (AF-FBAD-PROMPT-STYLEBLOCK)
Gate B (Image Prompts) independent QC scorecard >= 8.5, no category < 7 (AF-FBAD-PROMPT-QC)

phases.name: Image generation — Make the 10 square images via Kie gpt-image-* (text baked in)

preflight.label: every image carries a real (non-placeholder) kie_task_id (AF-FBAD-IMAGE-TASKID)

additional_preflights.label: every image is IMAGE_EDGE_PX x IMAGE_EDGE_PX (default 1500x1500, 1:1) (AF-FBAD-IMAGE-SIZE)
every image model id starts with GPT_IMAGE_MODEL_PREFIX (gpt-image-) so any future gpt-image-N is accepted (AF-FBAD-IMAGE-MODEL)
the running spend tally never crosses the ceiling (cheap local arithmetic, not a balance call) (AF-FBAD-TALLY-CROSS)
Gate C (Images) independent VISION QC scorecard >= 8.5, no category < 7 — judges baked-in text legibility (AF-FBAD-IMAGE-QC)

phases.name: Targeting — Build the verified audience brief in PLAI's three-tier shape (Audience Research Specialist)

preflight.label: the brief is the 3-tier Group->Layer1/2/3 shape with an explanation per group (AF-FBAD-TARGETING-SHAPE)

additional_preflights.label: every interest resolves to a real Meta entity OR is marked flagged-unverified (never invented) (AF-FBAD-TARGETING-REAL)
Gate D (Targeting) independent QC scorecard >= 8.5, no category < 7 (AF-FBAD-TARGETING-QC)

phases.name: Deliver — Host images in GoHighLevel, build the ad-text doc + PLAI brief, board the campaign

preflight.label: selection == bodies == headlines == prompts == images, matched 1:1 (AF-FBAD-FANOUT)

additional_preflights.label: every image hosted in GoHighLevel with a real public URL + HTTP-200 recorded (AF-FBAD-GHL-URL)
the ad-text doc has 10 separate Headline+Body block pairs matching the approved copy (AF-FBAD-ADTEXT-DOC)
every REQUIRED_PLAI_FIELDS field is present in the PLAI brief (AF-FBAD-PLAI-FIELDS)
the job is on the Command Center board (campaign_id recorded) (AF-FBAD-BOARD)
Gate E (Final Package) independent Devil's-Advocate scorecard >= 8.5, no category < 7 (AF-FBAD-PACKAGE-QC)
every QC scorecard is independent: grader != maker, independent:true, block present (AF-FBAD-QC-INDEPENDENCE)

phases.name: Approve-to-publish — SECOND human pause: owner approves, then the PLAI handoff happens

preflight.label: approval receipt carries approved_by + approval_received_at + owner_confirmed:true (AF-FBAD-APPROVE)

autofails.trigger: the S0-INTAKE job-manifest.json is missing or does not set brief_complete:true, OR is missing any required field (job_id, show_name, audience_profile_ref, money_ceiling_usd, estimated_cost_usd, owner). The intake brief is the precondition for every downstream stage; never guess at a missing input.

the up-front cost estimate is over the per-job ceiling BEFORE any money is spent: job-manifest cost_estimate_approved is not true OR estimated_cost_usd > money_ceiling_usd. HARD STOP — the estimate is announced and gated before the first paid image.

the run-id ledger ad_run_ledger.json is missing, OR its run_id does not equal the job_id, OR it carries no events[] log. Every paid receipt must be namespaced by the unique run-id so a retry never re-spends or double-uploads; the 'what already happened' log is that guarantee.
the S1 overlays receipt overlay_count is not exactly OVERLAY_COUNT_LOCKED (default 70). The human picks 10 from this fixed set; a short or padded set breaks the pick-10 contract.
one or more overlay lines fall outside OVERLAY_WORD_MIN..OVERLAY_WORD_MAX words. An overlay that is too long does not bake legibly into a 1:1 image; too short loses the hook.
the S1 overlays receipt does not record top_line_present:true — the fixed locked top line (the recurring lead line every overlay set must open with) is missing.
the copy receipt does not record on_mission:true — the copy must FEATURE the guest/show (recruit, spotlight), never 'sell a product'. Off-mission copy is rejected before pick-10.
the copy receipt does not record audience_wording_preserved:true — the client's exact audience wording (their words for who it is for) must be carried verbatim, never paraphrased away.

Gate A (The Words) failed: the copy-qc scorecard is missing, pass is not true, average < 8.5, or any category < 7. The 70 overlays + 10 bodies + 10 headlines are graded by an independent reviewer (a different worker than the copywriter).

the saved selection is not exactly SELECTION_COUNT_LOCKED (default 10) distinct picks. The owner's reply is checked for count, de-duplicated, and echoed back; a second reply replaces the first (never adds).
a pick is not a real in-range index of the overlay set (out of 1..overlay_count). The selection must be a genuine subset of the overlays the owner was shown.
one or more bodies do not open with a hook within BODY_HOOK_MAX_CHARS (default 125) characters. The first 125 characters are what shows above the fold before 'See more'.
one or more bodies do not carry exactly BODY_CTA_COUNT (default 3) calls-to-action. Direct-response bodies use a fixed CTA cadence; a body with the wrong number is rejected.
one or more bodies have an emoji count outside BODY_EMOJI_MIN..BODY_EMOJI_MAX. Emoji are a controlled scannability device, not decoration; over/under use both fail.
one or more headlines do not match any of the locked HEADLINE_SHAPES_LOCKED shapes recorded in the receipt. Headlines may only use the locked shapes; an off-shape headline is rejected.

one or more image prompts do not declare the fixed PROMPT_BUILD_ORDER sections in order (the receipt's sections list per prompt is wrong). The build order is what keeps the 10 images one cohesive campaign.

one or more image prompts fall outside PROMPT_MIN_CHARS..PROMPT_MAX_CHARS (default 3500..18000) characters. A thin prompt yields generic art; an over-long one confuses the model. Richness is the floor that encodes creativity/typography/color-grading/quality/facial-intelligence.

one or more image prompts do not spell out the brand style-block AND the exact words to bake into the image (the receipt's styleblock_ok / baked_text_present per prompt is not true). The model bakes the text, so the exact text must be in the prompt.

Gate B (Image Prompts) failed: the prompt-qc scorecard is missing, pass is not true, average < 8.5, or any category < 7. The prompts are graded by an independent prompt reviewer (not the prompt author).

an image entry carries no real kie_task_id: the value is null, empty, or a placeholder token (TASK_ID, xxxx, TODO, fake, ...). A missing/placeholder task id means the image was not really generated (fabrication) or not recorded — both fail. The task id is the anti-fabrication proof.
an image is not IMAGE_EDGE_PX x IMAGE_EDGE_PX (default 1500x1500, a 1:1 square). The Facebook/Instagram feed ad requires the locked square size; a non-square or wrong-size asset is rejected.

an image's recorded model id does not start with GPT_IMAGE_MODEL_PREFIX ('gpt-image-'). The check accepts gpt-image-2 AND any future gpt-image-N (gpt-image-3, gpt-image-2-image-to-image, ...) with no code change, but rejects a non-gpt-image provider so generation stays on the Kie gpt-image family.

the cheap running spend tally crossed the ceiling: ledger spent_usd > money_ceiling_usd, OR an image entry recorded would_cross:true (the next paid image would have crossed the ceiling so it must STOP). This is local arithmetic, not a live balance lookup per image.

Gate C (Images) failed: the image-qc scorecard is missing, pass is not true, average < 8.5, or any category < 7. A worker that can SEE the picture and did not generate it grades it — this is where baked-in text legibility is judged now that the separate OCR step is dropped.

the targeting brief is not the PLAI three-tier shape: a group is missing its Layer 1/2/3 structure or its plain-English explanation. PLAI's builder expects Group -> three interest layers with a why per group.

an interest entry is neither resolved to a real Meta entity (a real audience id) NOR marked flagged-unverified. Inventing a Meta interest is forbidden; when no resolver/key exists the entry degrades to flagged-unverified so the package can still ship — it is never fabricated.

Gate D (Targeting) failed: the targeting-qc scorecard is missing, pass is not true, average < 8.5, or any category < 7. The brief is graded by an independent targeting reviewer (not the audience researcher).

the 1:1 fan-out is broken: the counts of selection, bodies, headlines, prompts, and images are not all equal (and == SELECTION_COUNT_LOCKED). Every chosen overlay must map to exactly one body, one headline, one prompt, and one image.

an image was not hosted in GoHighLevel with a real public link: a deliver entry carries no https GoHighLevel URL, the URL is a placeholder token, or no HTTP-200 verification was recorded. A fabricated link is never accepted.

the copy-paste ad-text document does not carry SELECTION_COUNT_LOCKED Headline+Body block pairs matching the approved copy: the deliver receipt's adtext_block_pairs is not the locked count, or adtext_matches_copy is not true. Each ad must be two separate copy-paste blocks.
the PLAI brief is missing one or more REQUIRED_PLAI_FIELDS. PLAI's builder asks for every field; a brief missing a field cannot be finished in PLAI.
the job is not on the Command Center board: the deliver receipt carries no campaign_id (the receipt-number that groups the cards). The campaign must be visible as one grouped campaign on the board.

Gate E (Final Package) failed: the package-qc scorecard is missing, pass is not true, average < 8.5, or any category < 7. The whole bundle is graded by the department's Devil's Advocate before the approve pause.

a QC scorecard is self-graded: its independence block is missing, independent is not true, or the grader name equals the maker name. Every grade must be written by a different worker than the one that produced the work (mirrors the presentations AF-QC-INDEPENDENCE rule).

the PLAI handoff was reached without a recorded approval: the approval receipt lacks approved_by, approval_received_at, or owner_confirmed:true. The second human pause cannot be skipped; publish only happens after an explicit owner approval (who + when).

Phase-0 Kie.ai balance preflight (run ONCE at start). For a paid job the live credit balance (GET the Kie credit endpoint) is below the estimated floor (estimated_cost_usd x FBAD_CREDIT_PER_USD x FBAD_KIE_BALANCE_FLOOR_MULTIPLIER), OR the balance could not be verified. HARD-ABORTS (exit 4) before any paid dispatch so a run never dies mid-batch. An unverifiable balance is never treated as 'enough'.

the dependency-map driver (ad_director.py) dispatched a phase before EVERY phase in its depends_on list had an attestation in working/checkpoints/ad_process_manifest.json AND its produces_artifact present — and no logged owner-authorized skip (working/checkpoints/phase_skip_approvals.json owner_approved:true) covers a missing NON-human-gate dependency. The two human gates PICK-10 and PUBLISH can NEVER be skipped (no skip record and no --adhoc relaxes them). Phase N reads its dependencies' attestations as a precondition, so skipping/reordering/wrong-owning_role is structurally impossible.

roles.description: NEW seat — the conductor. Reads the two inputs, files the job on the board as one campaign with one card per stage, gives the run its receipt-number, estimates cost up front and sets the ceiling, watches the running tally and stops before crossing, runs the foreman (ad_director.py), starts the parallel stages once the 10 are picked, and parks the job at the two human pauses. Does none of the writing/design/pushing itself. Mirrors Skill 47's Movie Producer.
roles.routing_note: The Producer is the sole pipeline operator inside a Skill 48 job. The Director of Paid Advertisement owns the parent campaign rollup and is where escalations land; the Producer drives the foreman.

roles.description: NEW seat — the words. Writes the 70 overlays (Brendan Kane lead; Phil Jones short directive lines; Shelle Rose Charvet tonal variety), the 10 bodies (Robert Bly lead; Joanna Wiebe + Donald Miller + Alex Hormozi co-pilots), and the 10 headlines (Robert Bly + Brendan Kane), each wearing a named author-persona hat. A dedicated seat because the Facebook Ads Specialist's own job description says it does not produce copy.
roles.routing_note: Copy stages only. The independent copy QC (Gate A) is graded by a different critic, never by this seat.

REUSED seat (graphics). Writes the image prompts (the 'Prompt Author' method governed by the Design Intelligence Unit / Skill 45) AND makes the images via Kie gpt-image-* with the text baked in. Auto-adopts future gpt-image versions. NEVER a book-author persona; never Vsevolod Pudovkin (that persona is for video/film editing).
REUSED seat. Builds the targeting brief in PLAI's three-tier shape; every interest must be real, or marked flagged-unverified — never invented.

REUSED lead seat (with the Instagram Ads Specialist). Owns the final handoff: host images in GoHighLevel, build the copy-paste ad-text document from the Copywriter's exact words, assemble the PLAI package. Does not write the copy.

REUSED silent seat. The human-eyeball quality check the machine can't do (Gate E maker-side critic role) — does the baked-in text read, is it on-brand, do the 10 picks differ. Never surfaced to the client.
REUSED seat. Confirms the machine-checked rules passed and moves cards to Done (workers never approve their own card; the board's boss-only rule enforces it).
REUSED conductor/router. Owns the parent campaign card (the rollup) and is where escalations land. Does NOT operate the pipeline.

personas.note: PINNED per stage (the runtime picker honors a pinned choice first). Only the 42 BUILT author blueprints are runnable; name-only entries (Russell Brunson, Jim Edwards, Jeremy Miner, Allan Dib) must NEVER be picked to run. The image-prompt stage uses NO book author. The foreman rejects any copy stage whose pinned persona has no persona-blueprint.md on disk.

handoff_targets.note: the finished PLAI-ready package is handed to a human to finish in PLAI's builder; PLAI is the ONLY ad path (no direct Meta/Facebook API).
wiring responders into the CRM is downstream Skill 44, not this skill.
a future results/winner feedback loop; only a named handoff is left for it.
